caption.full:
Navarone Garibaldi Garcia defends $5,500 pizza oven GoFundMe

Navarone Garibaldi Garcia launched a GoFundMe to raise $5,500 for an affordable organic pizza business. Critics questioned why he was crowdfunding instead of asking his mother for cash. Garcia stated he is already contributing 'a lot' of his own funds and has many bills to pay.

Do you think he should lean on his family or stick to funding it himself?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#CelebrityNews #Hollywood #NavaroneGaribaldiGarcia #PriscillaPresley
caption.firstComment: What would you do in his place — use your own cash or ask Priscilla for help?
